Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to merge two event logs Log A and Log B

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Mapping events between log A and log B

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: They are essentially same event Order Received vs OrderReceived

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can merge them noting potential slight difference in timestamp and naming variations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A has Order Validated at 2023 10 10T10 01 30Z Log B has OrderValidation at 2023 10 10T10 01 29Z These are clearly matching events because times differ by just one second So they merge into single record

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment Processed at 10 02 00Z and PaymentCheck at 10 02 05Z The difference is 5 seconds which is greater than our threshold of 2 seconds so I will keep them separate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Shipped at 10 05 00Z and Shipping at 10 05 02Z They likely represent same event So merge them as well

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Quality Check remains unmatched with any event in Log A and Item Delivered has no corresponding event in Log B

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I choose Log A timestamps as primary because it is considered the primary timeline

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final ordering Order Received Order Validated Payment Processed PaymentCheck Quality Check Shipping Item Delivered
